import io
import string

fn main() -> Result<Unit, String>
  let input = io.read_to_end()
  let tokens = string.split_whitespace(input)
  mut sum = 0
  mut count = 0
  for token in tokens
    match string.parse_int(token)
    when Some(x)
      sum = sum + x
      count = count + 1
    when None
      ()
    end
  end
  let avg = sum / count
  print("avg=#{avg}")
  Ok(())
end
